achievements.name: Winds of Change
achievements.description: Prologue Cleared

achievements.name: The Era of Great Strife
achievements.description: Begin your legend in these turbulent times

achievements.name: Unfathomable Mind of the Aged Emperor
achievements.description: Persuade the Aged Emperor and protect Yu Gong

achievements.name: Resourceful
achievements.description: Using different methods to ensure your survival with the old Emperor

achievements.name: Rain Beating on Duckweed
achievements.description: Chapter 1 Cleared

achievements.name: Destined by Heaven
achievements.description: Blessed by heaven at the uprising, becoming the Child of Fortune

achievements.name: Unyielding Bones
achievements.description: Even if you're down, you can't let Zheng Sikong look down on you.

achievements.name: Courage to Speak Frankly
achievements.description: You are adept at speaking frankly, never pretending ignorance, even when facing the Emperor.

achievements.name: The Trials Begin
achievements.description: Chapter 2 Cleared

achievements.name: A Gift as Weighty as the Affection Behind It
achievements.description: Give the gift that moves Zu Kun.

achievements.name: Kung Fu Master
achievements.description: Defeat Zu Yue in a duel

achievements.name: From Depths to the Deep
achievements.description: Persuade the Emperor to let you accompany Zu Kun north

achievements.name: Decency
achievements.description: Bring about your own dignified end by being stubbornly beaten by Zu Yue

achievements.name: Sharpening the Blade
achievements.description: Chapter 3 Cleared

achievements.name: Turning the Tables
achievements.description: Go with the flow and use Shi Lang's scheme against him

achievements.name: Emperor Wu of Xuan
achievements.description: Fail in commanding the surprise attack, and after being captured, perform a dance for Shi Lang

achievements.name: Break Mountains and Valleys
achievements.description: Chapter 4 Cleared

achievements.name: Master of Comic Banter
achievements.description: Uncover all of Shi Lang's schemes before the final assault

achievements.name: Fickle Hearts
achievements.description: In a critical moment, Liu Dadao still believes his life is most important

achievements.name: Struggling Desperately
achievements.description: Conquer Liu Dadao with your charm

achievements.name: Rebirth Through Destruction
achievements.description: Defend Yiyang and achieve victory

achievements.name: Inquiring of Heaven's Mandate
achievements.description: Chapter 5 Cleared

achievements.name: To Act and to Refrain from Acting
achievements.description: Succeed in the uprising without harming a large number of common people

achievements.name: Between North and South
achievements.description: Carve out a domain, creating a three-way balance of power in this chaotic world

achievements.name: Emperor Yang of Xuan
achievements.description: there are so many potential lovers to choose from, but you only pick one from among those potential lovers

achievements.name: Receiving the Mandate in Response to Heaven
achievements.description: Ascend the throne and proclaim it to the world

achievements.name: The Record of Great Peace
achievements.description: Chapter 6 Cleared

achievements.name: Emperor You of Xuan
achievements.description: Indulge in beauty, neglect state affairs, and remain unrepentant

achievements.name: Emperor Zong of Xuan
achievements.description: Awaken suddenly amidst wine and lust, abdicating in favor of the Crown Prince

achievements.name: Never Suspect the Man you Need
achievements.description: No matter what others say, insist on reusing Zhu Yuanzhi

achievements.name: Emperor Fei of Xuan
achievements.description: Former soft-heartedness leads to bitter consequences

achievements.name: Emperor Shang of Xuan
achievements.description: No stubborn emperor throughout history surpasses you in obstinacy

achievements.name: Longwu Reformation
achievements.description: Heaven's Mandate is not to be feared, the ancestors' ways are not to be followed, others' words are not to be heeded.

achievements.name: Xunyang Ventures Beyond the Frontier
achievements.description: The bloom that never arrives, the unforgettable face of the past.

achievements.name: Showering Favors Equally
achievements.description: Short are the nights of spring pleasure, the sun rises high, from then on the ruler no holds early court.

achievements.name: All Under Heaven Unified
achievements.description: Chapter 7 Cleared

achievements.name: Emperor Huai of Xuan
achievements.description: The reform fails, cut the loss courageously.

achievements.name: Emperor Ai of Xuan
achievements.description: Gamble on the nation's fortune being with you, pushing the reform radically even after failure

achievements.name: Emperor Kang of Xuan
achievements.description: Seek stability in all things, thus securing a place in history.

achievements.name: Emperor Zhuang of Xuan
achievements.description: To hesitate in making a decision is to invite disaster.

achievements.name: Emperor Ming of Xuan
achievements.description: No peace marriages, no tribute, reclaim the lost territories, recover the Land.

achievements.name: Emperor Jing of Xuan
achievements.description: Unclear succession leads to future calamity, thus the empire falls in the second generation.

achievements.name: Emperor Cheng of Xuan
achievements.description: No place more merciless than the Family of the Emperor.

achievements.name: Emperor Wen of Xuan
achievements.description: Hail the Unified Empire.

achievements.name: Emperor Guang Wu of Xuan
achievements.description: All lands pay homage, all nations bow.

achievements.name: Emperor Zhao of Xuan
achievements.description: In this world, all are bound together, yet much lies beyond our grasp.

achievements.name: No Way Home
achievements.description: Ten years parted, one living, one dead; Not thinking, Yet never forgetting.

achievements.name: When the Last Sail Vanishes
achievements.description: All realms I have beheld, all paths I have known.
